entry.title: Bill 127 (Hawaiʻi County): On agenda 2026-04-23
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 5 OF THE HAWAI‘I COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A CONSTRUCTION CODE COMMISSION

Establishes a construction code commission to advise the Mayor, County Council, and Director of Public Works on the adoption, updating, amendment, and interpretation of the County construction codes.

Latest action: On agenda 2026-04-23

View on the council site
